# Welcome To Roman Self Drive

## Roman Self Drive Provides Car, Van, Truck & Refrigerated Vehicle Hire From Our Depot In Byfleet, Surrey. Fantastic Low Rates, New Vehicles & A Great Service From Start To Finish

* * *

**Why Rent From Us?**

- Roman Self Drive Has One Of The Largest Independent Rental Fleets In The Area
- Cars, Vans, Trucks & Regrigerated Vehicles All Available - Over 25 Vehicle Types To Choose From
- Fantastic Low Rates
- Prices Are Fixed - Unlike Other Companies Who Hike Prices With Demand
- Some Of The Very Best Service Levels In The Industry
- Rental Periods Available On A Daily, Weekly, Weekend Or Long Term Basis
- Great Discounts For 28 Day + Rentals - Options Of Insurance
- European & Continetnal Vehicle Hire Specialists
- Corporate & Credit Accounts Available With A Dedicated Account Manager (subject to credit status)

* * *

With Nearly 30 Years Of Vehicle Rental Under Our Belt We Have Worked Hard To Give You, The Customer, A Great Rental Experience From Start To Finish! Our New Website Aims To Provide You With The Very Latest Information On All Vehicle Rental Services Available At Roman Self Drive. Whether You Need To Hire A Car, Van, Truck Or Refrigerated Vehicle - We Have Them All On Fleet & Plenty To Choose From. Rental Periods Are Available On A Daily, Weekly, Weekend Or 28 Day + Basis And The Longer You Rent The Vehicle For, The Cheaper It Gets. We Specialise In European & Continental Vehicle Hire - Give Our Friendly Team A Call On 01932 350086 & They Will Provide You With A Fixed Price For Your Trip Abroad & They Will Even Organise The Insurance & Breakdown Paperwork For You - Hassle Free Vehicle Hire - The Way It Should Be. Whether You Are A Retail Customer With A One Off Need To Rent A Car, Van, Truck Or Refrigerated Vehicle Or A Business With A Requirement To Rent Vehicles Regularly (Corporate & Credit Accounts Are Available) - We Want To Hear From You. Dont Just Listen To Us - See What Our Customers Have To Say ...

* * *

> This Is The 2nd Time I Have Hired From Romans - Both Times The Vehicles Have Been Great & The People Are Lovely - A Cut Above The Rest!
>
> Huw Rees \- Retail Customer
